title: Stale-catch: change-time invalidation heartbeat (current through v2.2.0)
summary: staleCatch kernel.ts detects memories invalidated by working tree/diff changes; surfaced by kage pr check lead line and kage staleguard for pre commit; stale caught events feed the value ledger and kage gains. Still accu
body: staleCatch (kernel.ts) detects memories invalidated by working-tree/diff changes; surfaced by kage pr check lead line and kage staleguard for pre-commit; stale_caught events feed the value ledger and kage gains. Still accurate in v2.2.0 with two additions: quiet refresh on non-default branches computes staleness in memory without persisting metadata rewrites (findings still reported), and personal packets are excluded from stale-catch entirely.

edges.evidence: Newer repo memory supersedes this packet.
